TimeREISE is applicable to any time series classification network, its runtime does not scale in a linear manner concerning the input shape and it does not rely on prior data knowledge. 深度神经网络是跨不同领域最成功的分类器之一。然而，由于它们在可解释性方面的局限性，它们的使用在安全关键环境中受到限制。可解释的人工智能研究领域解决了这个问题。然而，大多数可解释性方法在设计上都与图像模态保持一致。本文介绍了 TimeREISE 一种与模型无关的归因方法，专门用于在时间序列分类的背景下取得成功。与涉及不同成熟测量的现有方法相比，该方法显示出优越的性能。 TimeREISE适用于任何时间序列分类网络，其运行时间不会以关于输入形状的线性方式缩放，并且不依赖于先验数据知识。 提出TimeREISE方法，用于时间序列分类的可解释性分析，解决深度神经网络在安全关键场景中的可解释性不足问题。 Dominique Mercier,Andreas Dengel,Sheraz Ahmed cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Simone Ruffini,Luca Caronti,Kasım Sinan Yıldırım,Davide Brunelli
title: NORM: An FPGA-based Non-volatile Memory Emulation Framework for Intermittent Computing
title_zh: NORM：一种基于 FPGA 的间歇计算非易失性存储器仿真框架
abstract: Intermittent computing systems operate by relying only on harvested energy accumulated in their tiny energy reservoirs, typically capacitors. An intermittent device dies due to a power failure when there is no energy in its capacitor and boots again when the harvested energy is sufficient to power its hardware components. Power failures prevent the forward progress of computation due to the frequent loss of computational state. To remedy this problem, intermittent computing systems comprise built-in fast non-volatile memories with high write endurance to store information that persists despite frequent power failures. However, the lack of design tools makes fast-prototyping these systems difficult. Even though FPGAs are common platforms for fast prototyping and behavioral verification of continuously-powered architectures, they do not target prototyping intermittent computing systems. This article introduces a new FPGA-based framework, named NORM (Non-volatile memORy eMulator), to emulate and verify the behavior of any intermittent computing system that exploits fast non-volatile memories. Our evaluation showed that NORM can be used to emulate and validate FeRAM-based transiently-powered hardware architectures successfully.
summary: Intermittent computing systems operate by relying only on harvested energy accumulated in their tiny energy reservoirs, typically capacitors. An intermittent device dies due to a power failure when there is no energy in its capacitor and boots again when the harvested energy is sufficient to power its hardware components. Power failures prevent the forward progress of computation due to the frequent loss of computational state. To remedy this problem, intermittent computing systems comprise built-in fast non-volatile memories with high write endurance to store information that persists despite frequent power failures. However, the lack of design tools makes fast-prototyping these systems difficult. Even though FPGAs are common platforms for fast prototyping and behavioral verification of continuously-powered architectures, they do not target prototyping intermittent computing systems. This article introduces a new FPGA-based framework, named NORM (Non-volatile memORy eMulator), to emulate and verify the behavior of any intermittent computing system that exploits fast non-volatile memories. Our evaluation showed that NORM can be used to emulate and validate FeRAM-based transiently-powered hardware architectures successfully.
abstract_zh: 间歇性计算系统仅依靠其微小能量储存器（通常是电容器）中积累的能量来运行。当电容器中没有能量时，间歇性设备会因电源故障而死亡，而当收集到的能量足以为其硬件组件供电时，设备会再次启动。由于计算状态频繁丢失，断电阻碍了计算的继续进行。为了解决这个问题，间歇性计算系统包含具有高写入耐久性的内置快速非易失性存储器，以存储即使频繁断电也能持续存在的信息。然而，缺乏设计工具使得这些系统的快速原型设计变得困难。尽管 FPGA 是用于连续供电架构的快速原型设计和行为验证的常见平台，但它们并不针对间歇性计算系统的原型设计。本文介绍了一种名为 NORM（非易失性存储器仿真器）的新的基于 FPGA 的框架，用于模拟和验证任何利用快速非易失性存储器的间歇性计算系统的行为。我们的评估表明，NORM 可用于成功模拟和验证基于 FeRAM 的瞬态供电硬件架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于FPGA的非易失性内存模拟框架NORM，用于验证间歇性计算系统的运行行为。
AI.motivation: 间歇性计算系统因能量采集受限易发生断电，导致计算状态丢失，而现有工具缺乏对这类系统的快速原型设计支持。
AI.method: 设计NORM框架通过FPGA模拟非易失性内存，实现对依赖快速非易失性存储的间歇性计算系统的验证。
AI.result: 评估表明NORM能成功模拟和验证基于FeRAM的瞬时供电硬件架构行为。
AI.conclusion: NORM为间歇性计算系统的原型设计提供了有效工具，填补了该领域设计工具的空白。

title: A Survey of Approaches for Event Sequence Analysis and Visualization using the ESeVis Framework
title_zh: 使用 ESeVis 框架进行事件序列分析和可视化方法的调查
abstract: Event sequence data is increasingly available. Many business operations are supported by information systems that record transactions, events, state changes, message exchanges, and so forth. This observation is equally valid for various industries, including production, logistics, healthcare, financial services, education, to name but a few. The variety of application areas explains that techniques for event sequence data analysis have been developed rather independently in different fields of computer science. Most prominent are contributions from information visualization and from process mining. So far, the contributions from these two fields have neither been compared nor have they been mapped to an integrated framework. In this paper, we develop the Event Sequence Visualization framework (ESeVis) that gives due credit to the traditions of both fields. Our mapping study provides an integrated perspective on both fields and identifies potential for synergies for future research.
summary: Event sequence data is increasingly available. Many business operations are supported by information systems that record transactions, events, state changes, message exchanges, and so forth. This observation is equally valid for various industries, including production, logistics, healthcare, financial services, education, to name but a few. The variety of application areas explains that techniques for event sequence data analysis have been developed rather independently in different fields of computer science. Most prominent are contributions from information visualization and from process mining. So far, the contributions from these two fields have neither been compared nor have they been mapped to an integrated framework. In this paper, we develop the Event Sequence Visualization framework (ESeVis) that gives due credit to the traditions of both fields. Our mapping study provides an integrated perspective on both fields and identifies potential for synergies for future research.
abstract_zh: 事件序列数据越来越可用。许多业务操作都由记录事务、事件、状态更改、消息交换等的信息系统支持。这一观察结果对于各个行业同样有效，包括生产、物流、医疗保健、金融服务、教育等。应用领域的多样性解释了事件序列数据分析技术在计算机科学的不同领域中是相当独立地开发的。最突出的是信息可视化和流程挖掘的贡献。到目前为止，这两个领域的贡献既没有被比较，也没有被映射到一个综合框架中。在本文中，我们开发了事件序列可视化框架（ESeVis），该框架对这两个领域的传统给予了应有的认可。我们的绘图研究提供了两个领域的综合视角，并确定了未来研究的协同潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESeVis框架，整合事件序列分析与可视化的跨领域方法，促进信息可视化与流程挖掘领域的协同研究。
AI.motivation: 事件序列分析技术在不同领域独立发展，缺乏统一框架比较与整合，阻碍跨领域协同创新。
AI.method: 通过映射研究，系统梳理信息可视化与流程挖掘领域的技术方法，构建ESeVis框架实现跨领域方法整合。
AI.result: 建立ESeVis框架，提供跨领域技术视角，识别出两个领域间的协同潜力与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: ESeVis框架为事件序列分析提供了统一视角，推动信息可视化与流程挖掘领域的深度融合与创新研究。

title: Meta Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 元知识蒸馏
abstract: Recent studies pointed out that knowledge distillation (KD) suffers from two degradation problems, the teacher-student gap and the incompatibility with strong data augmentations, making it not applicable to training state-of-the-art models, which are trained with advanced augmentations. However, we observe that a key factor, i.e., the temperatures in the softmax functions for generating probabilities of both the teacher and student models, was mostly overlooked in previous methods. With properly tuned temperatures, such degradation problems of KD can be much mitigated. However, instead of relying on a naive grid search, which shows poor transferability, we propose Meta Knowledge Distillation (MKD) to meta-learn the distillation with learnable meta temperature parameters. The meta parameters are adaptively adjusted during training according to the gradients of the learning objective. We validate that MKD is robust to different dataset scales, different teacher/student architectures, and different types of data augmentation. With MKD, we achieve the best performance with popular ViT architectures among compared methods that use only ImageNet-1K as training data, ranging from tiny to large models. With ViT-L, we achieve 86.5% with 600 epochs of training, 0.6% better than MAE that trains for 1,650 epochs.
summary: Recent studies pointed out that knowledge distillation (KD) suffers from two degradation problems, the teacher-student gap and the incompatibility with strong data augmentations, making it not applicable to training state-of-the-art models, which are trained with advanced augmentations. However, we observe that a key factor, i.e., the temperatures in the softmax functions for generating probabilities of both the teacher and student models, was mostly overlooked in previous methods. With properly tuned temperatures, such degradation problems of KD can be much mitigated. However, instead of relying on a naive grid search, which shows poor transferability, we propose Meta Knowledge Distillation (MKD) to meta-learn the distillation with learnable meta temperature parameters. The meta parameters are adaptively adjusted during training according to the gradients of the learning objective. We validate that MKD is robust to different dataset scales, different teacher/student architectures, and different types of data augmentation. With MKD, we achieve the best performance with popular ViT architectures among compared methods that use only ImageNet-1K as training data, ranging from tiny to large models. With ViT-L, we achieve 86.5% with 600 epochs of training, 0.6% better than MAE that trains for 1,650 epochs.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究指出，知识蒸馏（KD）存在两个退化问题，即师生差距和与强数据增强的不兼容，使其不适用于训练经过高级增强训练的最先进模型。然而，我们观察到一个关键因素，即用于生成教师和学生模型概率的 softmax 函数中的温度，在以前的方法中大多被忽视。通过适当调节温度，可以大大减轻 KD 的降解问题。然而，我们不依赖于可迁移性差的朴素网格搜索，而是提出元知识蒸馏（MKD）来使用可学习的元温度参数来元学习蒸馏。元参数在训练过程中根据学习目标的梯度自适应调整。我们验证 MKD 对于不同的数据集规模、不同的教师/学生架构以及不同类型的数据增强具有鲁棒性。通过 MKD，我们在仅使用 ImageNet-1K 作为训练数据（从小型模型到大型模型）的比较方法中，通过流行的 ViT 架构实现了最佳性能。使用 ViT-L，我们在 600 个 epoch 的训练中达到了 86.5%，比训练 1,650 个 epoch 的 MAE 好 0.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Meta Knowledge Distillation（MKD）的方法，通过自适应调整知识蒸馏中的softmax温度参数，解决教师-学生模型间的差距及与强数据增强的不兼容问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法因忽视softmax温度参数的优化，导致在训练先进模型时出现性能退化问题，尤其在强数据增强场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出MKD框架，通过元学习机制动态调整可学习的温度参数，根据训练过程中的梯度信息自适应优化教师和学生模型的概率分布对齐过程。
AI.result: 在ViT架构上，使用ImageNet-1K数据训练时，MKD在600个训练周期内达到86.5%的准确率，比MAE（1,650周期训练）高出0.6%，且在不同规模模型和增强策略下均表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: MKD通过元学习温度参数有效缓解了知识蒸馏的退化问题，在保持模型性能的同时显著减少训练周期，为先进模型的蒸馏提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Meta Knowledge Distillation（MKD）的方法，通过自适应调整知识蒸馏中的softmax温度参数，解决教师-学生模型间的差距及与强数据增强的不兼容问题。

search_text: Meta Knowledge Distillation 元知识蒸馏 Recent studies pointed out that knowledge distillation (KD) suffers from two degradation problems, the teacher-student gap and the incompatibility with strong data augmentations, making it not applicable to training state-of-the-art models, which are trained with advanced augmentations. However, we observe that a key factor, i.e., the temperatures in the softmax functions for generating probabilities of both the teacher and student models, was mostly overlooked in previous methods. With properly tuned temperatures, such degradation problems of KD can be much mitigated. However, instead of relying on a naive grid search, which shows poor transferability, we propose Meta Knowledge Distillation (MKD) to meta-learn the distillation with learnable meta temperature parameters. The meta parameters are adaptively adjusted during training according to the gradients of the learning objective. We validate that MKD is robust to different dataset scales, different teacher/student architectures, and different types of data augmentation. With MKD, we achieve the best performance with popular ViT architectures among compared methods that use only ImageNet-1K as training data, ranging from tiny to large models. With ViT-L, we achieve 86.5% with 600 epochs of training, 0.6% better than MAE that trains for 1,650 epochs. 最近的研究指出，知识蒸馏（KD）存在两个退化问题，即师生差距和与强数据增强的不兼容，使其不适用于训练经过高级增强训练的最先进模型。然而，我们观察到一个关键因素，即用于生成教师和学生模型概率的 softmax 函数中的温度，在以前的方法中大多被忽视。通过适当调节温度，可以大大减轻 KD 的降解问题。然而，我们不依赖于可迁移性差的朴素网格搜索，而是提出元知识蒸馏（MKD）来使用可学习的元温度参数来元学习蒸馏。元参数在训练过程中根据学习目标的梯度自适应调整。我们验证 MKD 对于不同的数据集规模、不同的教师/学生架构以及不同类型的数据增强具有鲁棒性。通过 MKD，我们在仅使用 ImageNet-1K 作为训练数据（从小型模型到大型模型）的比较方法中，通过流行的 ViT 架构实现了最佳性能。使用 ViT-L，我们在 600 个 epoch 的训练中达到了 86.5%，比训练 1,650 个 epoch 的 MAE 好 0.6%。 本文提出了一种名为Meta Knowledge Distillation（MKD）的方法，通过自适应调整知识蒸馏中的softmax温度参数，解决教师-学生模型间的差距及与强数据增强的不兼容问题。 Jihao Liu,Boxiao Liu,Hongsheng Li,Yu Liu cs.LG,cs.CV

title: On the Complexity of Scheduling Problems With a Fixed Number of Parallel Identical Machines
title_zh: 关于固定数量并行相同机器的调度问题的复杂性
comment: A shorter version is to be published in SOFSEM 2023 Proceedings. Changes to previous versions are mainly improvements to readability. 33 pages, 1 figure
comments: A shorter version is to be published in SOFSEM 2023 Proceedings. Changes to previous versions are mainly improvements to readability. 33 pages, 1 figure
abstract: In parallel machine scheduling, we are given a set of jobs, together with a number of machines and our goal is to decide for each job, when and on which machine(s) it should be scheduled in order to minimize some objective function. Different machine models, job characteristics and objective functions result in a multitude of scheduling problems and many of them are NP-hard, even for a fixed number of identical machines. In this work, we give conditional running time lower bounds for a large number of scheduling problems, indicating the optimality of some classical algorithms. Most notably, we show that the algorithm by Lawler and Moore for $1||\sum w_jU_j$ and $Pm||C_{max}$, as well as the algorithm by Lee and Uzsoy for $P2||\sum w_jC_j$ are probably optimal. There is still small room for improvement for the $1|Rej\leq Q|\sum w_jU_j$ algorithm by Zhang et al., the algorithm for $1||\sum T_j$ by Lawler and the FPTAS for $1||\sum w_jU_j$ by Gens and Levner. We also give a lower bound for $P2|any|C_{max}$ and improve the dynamic program by Du and Leung from $\mathcal{O}(nP^2)$ to $\mathcal{O}(nP)$, matching this new lower bound. Here, $P$ is the sum of all processing times. The same idea also improves the algorithm for $P3|any|C_{max}$ by Du and Leung from $\mathcal{O}(nP^5)$ to $\mathcal{O}(nP^2)$. While our results suggest the optimality of some classical algorithms, they also motivate future research in cases where the best known algorithms do not quite match the lower bounds.
summary: In parallel machine scheduling, we are given a set of jobs, together with a number of machines and our goal is to decide for each job, when and on which machine(s) it should be scheduled in order to minimize some objective function. Different machine models, job characteristics and objective functions result in a multitude of scheduling problems and many of them are NP-hard, even for a fixed number of identical machines. In this work, we give conditional running time lower bounds for a large number of scheduling problems, indicating the optimality of some classical algorithms. Most notably, we show that the algorithm by Lawler and Moore for $1||\sum w_jU_j$ and $Pm||C_{max}$, as well as the algorithm by Lee and Uzsoy for $P2||\sum w_jC_j$ are probably optimal. There is still small room for improvement for the $1|Rej\leq Q|\sum w_jU_j$ algorithm by Zhang et al., the algorithm for $1||\sum T_j$ by Lawler and the FPTAS for $1||\sum w_jU_j$ by Gens and Levner. We also give a lower bound for $P2|any|C_{max}$ and improve the dynamic program by Du and Leung from $\mathcal{O}(nP^2)$ to $\mathcal{O}(nP)$, matching this new lower bound. Here, $P$ is the sum of all processing times. The same idea also improves the algorithm for $P3|any|C_{max}$ by Du and Leung from $\mathcal{O}(nP^5)$ to $\mathcal{O}(nP^2)$. While our results suggest the optimality of some classical algorithms, they also motivate future research in cases where the best known algorithms do not quite match the lower bounds.
abstract_zh: 在并行机器调度中，我们得到一组作业以及许多机器，我们的目标是为每个作业决定何时以及在哪台机器上调度它，以便最小化某些目标函数。不同的机器模型、作业特征和目标函数会导致大量的调度问题，其中许多问题都是 NP 困难的，即使对于固定数量的相同机器也是如此。在这项工作中，我们给出了大量调度问题的条件运行时间下界，表明了一些经典算法的最优性。最值得注意的是，我们表明 Lawler 和 Moore 对 $1||\sum w_jU_j$ 和 $Pm||C_{max}$ 的算法，以及 Lee 和 Uzsoy 对 $P2||\sum w_jC_j$ 的算法可能是最优的。对于Zhang等人提出的$1|Rej\leq Q|\sum w_jU_j$算法、Lawler提出的$1||\sum T_j$算法以及Gens和Levner提出的$1||\sum w_jU_j$ FPTAS算法来说，仍有很小的改进空间。我们还给出了 $P2|any|C_{max}$ 的下界，并将 Du 和 Leung 的动态规划从 $\mathcal{O}(nP^2)$ 改进为 $\mathcal{O}(nP)$，以匹配这个新的下界。这里，$P$是所有处理时间的总和。同样的想法也将 Du 和 Leung 的 $P3|any|C_{max}$ 算法从 $\mathcal{O}(nP^5)$ 改进为 $\mathcal{O}(nP^2)$。虽然我们的结果表明了一些经典算法的最优性，但它们也激励了未来在最著名的算法与下限不完全匹配的情况下的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了固定数量并行相同机器下的调度问题复杂性，通过条件性运行时间下界分析经典算法的最优性。
AI.motivation: 调度问题在固定机器数量下仍存在NP难问题，需明确经典算法的最优性及改进空间。
AI.method: 通过条件性运行时间下界分析，结合动态规划优化技术改进算法复杂度。
AI.result: 证明Lawler-Moore等算法的最优性，将Du-Leung动态规划复杂度从O(nP²)降至O(nP)，并改进其他调度问题的算法效率。
AI.conclusion: 部分经典算法已达到理论下界最优，但仍有少数算法存在改进空间，需进一步研究突破下界。

authors_text: Guochen Yu,Andong Li,Hui Wang,Yutian Wang,Yuxuan Ke,Chengshi Zheng
title: DBT-Net: Dual-branch federative magnitude and phase estimation with attention-in-attention transformer for monaural speech enhancement
title_zh: DBT-Net：使用注意力中注意力变换器进行双分支联合幅度和相位估计，用于单耳语音增强
comment: 15 pages;Accepted by IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio. Speech, Lang. Process
comments: 15 pages;Accepted by IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio. Speech, Lang. Process
abstract: The decoupling-style concept begins to ignite in the speech enhancement area, which decouples the original complex spectrum estimation task into multiple easier sub-tasks i.e., magnitude-only recovery and the residual complex spectrum estimation)}, resulting in better performance and easier interpretability. In this paper, we propose a dual-branch federative magnitude and phase estimation framework, dubbed DBT-Net, for monaural speech enhancement, aiming at recovering the coarse- and fine-grained regions of the overall spectrum in parallel. From the complementary perspective, the magnitude estimation branch is designed to filter out dominant noise components in the magnitude domain, while the complex spectrum purification branch is elaborately designed to inpaint the missing spectral details and implicitly estimate the phase information in the complex-valued spectral domain. To facilitate the information flow between each branch, interaction modules are introduced to leverage features learned from one branch, so as to suppress the undesired parts and recover the missing components of the other branch. Instead of adopting the conventional RNNs and temporal convolutional networks for sequence modeling, we employ a novel attention-in-attention transformer-based network within each branch for better feature learning. More specially, it is composed of several adaptive spectro-temporal attention transformer-based modules and an adaptive hierarchical attention module, aiming to capture long-term time-frequency dependencies and further aggregate intermediate hierarchical contextual information. Comprehensive evaluations on the WSJ0-SI84 + DNS-Challenge and VoiceBank + DEMAND dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms previous advanced systems and yields state-of-the-art performance in terms of speech quality and intelligibility.
summary: The decoupling-style concept begins to ignite in the speech enhancement area, which decouples the original complex spectrum estimation task into multiple easier sub-tasks i.e., magnitude-only recovery and the residual complex spectrum estimation)}, resulting in better performance and easier interpretability. In this paper, we propose a dual-branch federative magnitude and phase estimation framework, dubbed DBT-Net, for monaural speech enhancement, aiming at recovering the coarse- and fine-grained regions of the overall spectrum in parallel. From the complementary perspective, the magnitude estimation branch is designed to filter out dominant noise components in the magnitude domain, while the complex spectrum purification branch is elaborately designed to inpaint the missing spectral details and implicitly estimate the phase information in the complex-valued spectral domain. To facilitate the information flow between each branch, interaction modules are introduced to leverage features learned from one branch, so as to suppress the undesired parts and recover the missing components of the other branch. Instead of adopting the conventional RNNs and temporal convolutional networks for sequence modeling, we employ a novel attention-in-attention transformer-based network within each branch for better feature learning. More specially, it is composed of several adaptive spectro-temporal attention transformer-based modules and an adaptive hierarchical attention module, aiming to capture long-term time-frequency dependencies and further aggregate intermediate hierarchical contextual information. Comprehensive evaluations on the WSJ0-SI84 + DNS-Challenge and VoiceBank + DEMAND dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms previous advanced systems and yields state-of-the-art performance in terms of speech quality and intelligibility.
abstract_zh: 解耦式概念开始在语音增强领域点燃，它将原始的复杂频谱估计任务解耦为多个更简单的子任务，即仅幅度恢复和残余复杂频谱估计）}，从而获得更好的性能和更容易的可解释性。在本文中，我们提出了一种双分支联邦幅度和相位估计框架，称为 DBT-Net，用于单耳语音增强，旨在并行恢复整个频谱的粗粒度和细粒度区域。从互补的角度来看，幅度估计分支旨在滤除幅度域中的主要噪声分量，而复杂频谱净化分支则精心设计用于修复丢失的频谱细节并隐式估计复值频谱域中的相位信息。为了促进每个分支之间的信息流动，引入交互模块来利用从一个分支学到的特征，从而抑制不需要的部分并恢复另一分支的缺失组件。我们没有采用传统的 RNN 和时间卷积网络进行序列建模，而是在每个分支中采用一种新颖的基于注意力中注意力变换器的网络，以实现更好的特征学习。更具体地说，它由几个基于自适应谱时注意变换器的模块和一个自适应分层注意模块组成，旨在捕获长期时频依赖性并进一步聚合中间分层上下文信息。对 WSJ0-SI84 + DNS-Challenge 和 VoiceBank + DEMAND 数据集的综合评估表明，所提出的方法始终优于以前的先进系统，并在语音质量和清晰度方面产生了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双分支联邦幅度和相位估计框架DBT-Net，用于单通道语音增强，通过并行恢复频谱的粗粒度和细粒度区域来提升语音质量。
AI.motivation: 传统复数谱估计任务复杂且难以解释，通过解耦为幅度恢复和残差复数谱估计两个子任务可提高性能和可解释性，但需解决分支间信息交互与细粒度特征提取的挑战。
AI.method: 设计双分支框架：幅度分支过滤主导噪声，复数谱净化分支填补缺失细节并隐式估计相位；引入交互模块促进分支间特征共享；采用注意力-注意力Transformer网络替代传统RNN/TCN，包含自适应时频注意力模块和分层注意力模块以捕捉长期依赖关系。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-SI84+DNS-Challenge和VoiceBank+DEMAND数据集上，DBT-Net在语音质量与可懂度指标上均优于先进方法，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦任务与双分支协同机制结合Transformer的时频建模能力，DBT-Net有效提升了单通道语音增强效果，为复数谱估计提供了新思路。

search_text: DBT-Net: Dual-branch federative magnitude and phase estimation with attention-in-attention transformer for monaural speech enhancement DBT-Net：使用注意力中注意力变换器进行双分支联合幅度和相位估计，用于单耳语音增强 The decoupling-style concept begins to ignite in the speech enhancement area, which decouples the original complex spectrum estimation task into multiple easier sub-tasks i.e., magnitude-only recovery and the residual complex spectrum estimation)}, resulting in better performance and easier interpretability. In this paper, we propose a dual-branch federative magnitude and phase estimation framework, dubbed DBT-Net, for monaural speech enhancement, aiming at recovering the coarse- and fine-grained regions of the overall spectrum in parallel. From the complementary perspective, the magnitude estimation branch is designed to filter out dominant noise components in the magnitude domain, while the complex spectrum purification branch is elaborately designed to inpaint the missing spectral details and implicitly estimate the phase information in the complex-valued spectral domain. To facilitate the information flow between each branch, interaction modules are introduced to leverage features learned from one branch, so as to suppress the undesired parts and recover the missing components of the other branch. Instead of adopting the conventional RNNs and temporal convolutional networks for sequence modeling, we employ a novel attention-in-attention transformer-based network within each branch for better feature learning. More specially, it is composed of several adaptive spectro-temporal attention transformer-based modules and an adaptive hierarchical attention module, aiming to capture long-term time-frequency dependencies and further aggregate intermediate hierarchical contextual information. Comprehensive evaluations on the WSJ0-SI84 + DNS-Challenge and VoiceBank + DEMAND dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms previous advanced systems and yields state-of-the-art performance in terms of speech quality and intelligibility. 解耦式概念开始在语音增强领域点燃，它将原始的复杂频谱估计任务解耦为多个更简单的子任务，即仅幅度恢复和残余复杂频谱估计）}，从而获得更好的性能和更容易的可解释性。在本文中，我们提出了一种双分支联邦幅度和相位估计框架，称为 DBT-Net，用于单耳语音增强，旨在并行恢复整个频谱的粗粒度和细粒度区域。从互补的角度来看，幅度估计分支旨在滤除幅度域中的主要噪声分量，而复杂频谱净化分支则精心设计用于修复丢失的频谱细节并隐式估计复值频谱域中的相位信息。为了促进每个分支之间的信息流动，引入交互模块来利用从一个分支学到的特征，从而抑制不需要的部分并恢复另一分支的缺失组件。我们没有采用传统的 RNN 和时间卷积网络进行序列建模，而是在每个分支中采用一种新颖的基于注意力中注意力变换器的网络，以实现更好的特征学习。更具体地说，它由几个基于自适应谱时注意变换器的模块和一个自适应分层注意模块组成，旨在捕获长期时频依赖性并进一步聚合中间分层上下文信息。对 WSJ0-SI84 + DNS-Challenge 和 VoiceBank + DEMAND 数据集的综合评估表明，所提出的方法始终优于以前的先进系统，并在语音质量和清晰度方面产生了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种双分支联邦幅度和相位估计框架DBT-Net，用于单通道语音增强，通过并行恢复频谱的粗粒度和细粒度区域来提升语音质量。 Guochen Yu,Andong Li,Hui Wang,Yutian Wang,Yuxuan Ke,Chengshi Zheng cs.SD,eess.AS

title: ActionFormer: Localizing Moments of Actions with Transformers
title_zh: ActionFormer：使用 Transformers 本地化动作时刻
abstract: Self-attention based Transformer models have demonstrated impressive results for image classification and object detection, and more recently for video understanding. Inspired by this success, we investigate the application of Transformer networks for temporal action localization in videos. To this end, we present ActionFormer -- a simple yet powerful model to identify actions in time and recognize their categories in a single shot, without using action proposals or relying on pre-defined anchor windows. ActionFormer combines a multiscale feature representation with local self-attention, and uses a light-weighted decoder to classify every moment in time and estimate the corresponding action boundaries. We show that this orchestrated design results in major improvements upon prior works. Without bells and whistles, ActionFormer achieves 71.0% mAP at tIoU=0.5 on THUMOS14, outperforming the best prior model by 14.1 absolute percentage points. Further, ActionFormer demonstrates strong results on ActivityNet 1.3 (36.6% average mAP) and EPIC-Kitchens 100 (+13.5% average mAP over prior works). Our code is available at http://github.com/happyharrycn/actionformer_release.
summary: Self-attention based Transformer models have demonstrated impressive results for image classification and object detection, and more recently for video understanding. Inspired by this success, we investigate the application of Transformer networks for temporal action localization in videos. To this end, we present ActionFormer -- a simple yet powerful model to identify actions in time and recognize their categories in a single shot, without using action proposals or relying on pre-defined anchor windows. ActionFormer combines a multiscale feature representation with local self-attention, and uses a light-weighted decoder to classify every moment in time and estimate the corresponding action boundaries. We show that this orchestrated design results in major improvements upon prior works. Without bells and whistles, ActionFormer achieves 71.0% mAP at tIoU=0.5 on THUMOS14, outperforming the best prior model by 14.1 absolute percentage points. Further, ActionFormer demonstrates strong results on ActivityNet 1.3 (36.6% average mAP) and EPIC-Kitchens 100 (+13.5% average mAP over prior works). Our code is available at http://github.com/happyharrycn/actionformer_release.
abstract_zh: 基于自注意力的 Transformer 模型已经在图像分类和目标检测以及最近的视频理解方面展示了令人印象深刻的结果。受这一成功的启发，我们研究了 Transformer 网络在视频中时间动作本地化的应用。为此，我们提出了 ActionFormer——一个简单但功能强大的模型，可以及时识别动作并在单个镜头中识别其类别，而无需使用动作建议或依赖预定义的锚窗口。 ActionFormer 将多尺度特征表示与局部自注意力相结合，并使用轻量级解码器对每个时刻进行分类并估计相应的动作边界。我们表明，这种精心策划的设计对之前的作品产生了重大改进。在没有花哨的情况下，ActionFormer 在 THUMOS14 上 tIoU=0.5 时实现了 71.0% mAP，比最佳先前模型高出 14.1 个绝对百分点。此外，ActionFormer 在 ActivityNet 1.3（平均 mAP 为 36.6%）和 EPIC-Kitchens 100（平均 mAP 比之前的作品+13.5%）上展示了强劲的结果。我们的代码可在 http://github.com/happyharrycn/actionformer_release 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出ActionFormer模型，利用Transformer进行视频中动作的时序定位与分类
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖动作提案或锚窗口，而ActionFormer通过Transformer实现更高效的时序动作定位
AI.method: 结合多尺度特征与局部自注意力机制，采用轻量级解码器实现时间点分类与动作边界估计
AI.result: 在THUMOS14上达71.0% mAP（超先前最佳14.1%），ActivityNet 1.3为36.6%平均mAP，EPIC-Kitchens 100提升13.5%
AI.conclusion: ActionFormer通过简洁设计显著提升动作定位性能，无需复杂模块即可实现端到端时序理解

authors_text: Jiacheng Ye,Jiahui Gao,Qintong Li,Hang Xu,Jiangtao Feng,Zhiyong Wu,Tao Yu,Lingpeng Kong
title: ZeroGen: Efficient Zero-shot Learning via Dataset Generation
title_zh: ZeroGen：通过数据集生成进行高效的零样本学习
abstract: There is a growing interest in dataset generation recently due to the superior generative capacity of large pre-trained language models (PLMs). In this paper, we study a flexible and efficient zero-short learning method, \textsc{ZeroGen}. Given a zero-shot task, we first generate a dataset from scratch using PLMs in an unsupervised manner. Then, we train a tiny task model (e.g., LSTM) under the supervision of the synthesized dataset. This approach allows highly efficient inference as the final task model only has orders of magnitude fewer parameters comparing to PLMs (e.g., GPT2-XL). Apart from being annotation-free and efficient, we argue that \textsc{ZeroGen} can also provide useful insights from the perspective of data-free model-agnostic knowledge distillation, and unreferenced text generation evaluation. Experiments and analysis on different NLP tasks, namely, text classification, question answering, and natural language inference, show the effectiveness of \textsc{ZeroGen}.
summary: There is a growing interest in dataset generation recently due to the superior generative capacity of large pre-trained language models (PLMs). In this paper, we study a flexible and efficient zero-short learning method, \textsc{ZeroGen}. Given a zero-shot task, we first generate a dataset from scratch using PLMs in an unsupervised manner. Then, we train a tiny task model (e.g., LSTM) under the supervision of the synthesized dataset. This approach allows highly efficient inference as the final task model only has orders of magnitude fewer parameters comparing to PLMs (e.g., GPT2-XL). Apart from being annotation-free and efficient, we argue that \textsc{ZeroGen} can also provide useful insights from the perspective of data-free model-agnostic knowledge distillation, and unreferenced text generation evaluation. Experiments and analysis on different NLP tasks, namely, text classification, question answering, and natural language inference, show the effectiveness of \textsc{ZeroGen}.
abstract_zh: 由于大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的卓越生成能力，最近人们对数据集生成越来越感兴趣。在本文中，我们研究了一种灵活高效的零短学习方法，\textsc{ZeroGen}。给定零样本任务，我们首先以无监督的方式使用 PLM 从头开始​​生成数据集。然后，我们在合成数据集的监督下训练一个微型任务模型（例如 LSTM）。这种方法可以实现高效推理，因为与 PLM（例如 GPT2-XL）相比，最终任务模型的参数仅少几个数量级。除了无注释和高效之外，我们认为 \textsc{ZeroGen} 还可以从无数据的模型不可知的知识蒸馏和未引用的文本生成评估的角度提供有用的见解。对不同 NLP 任务（即文本分类、问答和自然语言推理）的实验和分析表明了 \textsc{ZeroGen} 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ZeroGen的高效零样本学习方法，通过预训练语言模型生成数据集并训练小型任务模型，实现高效推理。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法依赖标注数据或大型模型直接推理，存在效率低、依赖性强的问题。ZeroGen旨在通过无监督生成数据集，实现无需标注且高效的零样本学习。
AI.method: 首先利用预训练语言模型（PLM）无监督生成任务相关数据集，随后在合成数据集上训练轻量级模型（如LSTM），最终模型参数量远少于PLM。
AI.result: 在文本分类、问答和自然语言推理等任务上的实验表明，ZeroGen在保持性能的同时显著提升了推理效率。
AI.conclusion: ZeroGen通过数据生成与知识蒸馏结合，为零样本学习提供了高效且无需标注的解决方案，并为无参考文本生成评估提供了新视角。

motivation: 现有零样本学习方法依赖标注数据或大型模型直接推理，存在效率低、依赖性强的问题。ZeroGen旨在通过无监督生成数据集，实现无需标注且高效的零样本学习。
method: 首先利用预训练语言模型（PLM）无监督生成任务相关数据集，随后在合成数据集上训练轻量级模型（如LSTM），最终模型参数量远少于PLM。
result: 在文本分类、问答和自然语言推理等任务上的实验表明，ZeroGen在保持性能的同时显著提升了推理效率。
conclusion: ZeroGen通过数据生成与知识蒸馏结合，为零样本学习提供了高效且无需标注的解决方案，并为无参考文本生成评估提供了新视角。
search_text: ZeroGen: Efficient Zero-shot Learning via Dataset Generation ZeroGen：通过数据集生成进行高效的零样本学习 There is a growing interest in dataset generation recently due to the superior generative capacity of large pre-trained language models (PLMs). In this paper, we study a flexible and efficient zero-short learning method, \textsc{ZeroGen}. Given a zero-shot task, we first generate a dataset from scratch using PLMs in an unsupervised manner. Then, we train a tiny task model (e.g., LSTM) under the supervision of the synthesized dataset. This approach allows highly efficient inference as the final task model only has orders of magnitude fewer parameters comparing to PLMs (e.g., GPT2-XL). Apart from being annotation-free and efficient, we argue that \textsc{ZeroGen} can also provide useful insights from the perspective of data-free model-agnostic knowledge distillation, and unreferenced text generation evaluation. Experiments and analysis on different NLP tasks, namely, text classification, question answering, and natural language inference, show the effectiveness of \textsc{ZeroGen}. 由于大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的卓越生成能力，最近人们对数据集生成越来越感兴趣。在本文中，我们研究了一种灵活高效的零短学习方法，\textsc{ZeroGen}。给定零样本任务，我们首先以无监督的方式使用 PLM 从头开始​​生成数据集。然后，我们在合成数据集的监督下训练一个微型任务模型（例如 LSTM）。这种方法可以实现高效推理，因为与 PLM（例如 GPT2-XL）相比，最终任务模型的参数仅少几个数量级。除了无注释和高效之外，我们认为 \textsc{ZeroGen} 还可以从无数据的模型不可知的知识蒸馏和未引用的文本生成评估的角度提供有用的见解。对不同 NLP 任务（即文本分类、问答和自然语言推理）的实验和分析表明了 \textsc{ZeroGen} 的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为ZeroGen的高效零样本学习方法，通过预训练语言模型生成数据集并训练小型任务模型，实现高效推理。 Jiacheng Ye,Jiahui Gao,Qintong Li,Hang Xu,Jiangtao Feng,Zhiyong Wu,Tao Yu,Lingpeng Kong cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Rui Li,Jianan Zhao,Chaozhuo Li,Di He,Yiqi Wang,Yuming Liu,Hao Sun,Senzhang Wang,Weiwei Deng,Yanming Shen,Xing Xie,Qi Zhang
title: HousE: Knowledge Graph Embedding with Householder Parameterization
title_zh: HouseE：具有 Householder 参数化的知识图嵌入
abstract: The effectiveness of knowledge graph embedding (KGE) largely depends on the ability to model intrinsic relation patterns and mapping properties. However, existing approaches can only capture some of them with insufficient modeling capacity. In this work, we propose a more powerful KGE framework named HousE, which involves a novel parameterization based on two kinds of Householder transformations: (1) Householder rotations to achieve superior capacity of modeling relation patterns; (2) Householder projections to handle sophisticated relation mapping properties. Theoretically, HousE is capable of modeling crucial relation patterns and mapping properties simultaneously. Besides, HousE is a generalization of existing rotation-based models while extending the rotations to high-dimensional spaces. Empirically, HousE achieves new state-of-the-art performance on five benchmark datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/anrep/HousE.
summary: The effectiveness of knowledge graph embedding (KGE) largely depends on the ability to model intrinsic relation patterns and mapping properties. However, existing approaches can only capture some of them with insufficient modeling capacity. In this work, we propose a more powerful KGE framework named HousE, which involves a novel parameterization based on two kinds of Householder transformations: (1) Householder rotations to achieve superior capacity of modeling relation patterns; (2) Householder projections to handle sophisticated relation mapping properties. Theoretically, HousE is capable of modeling crucial relation patterns and mapping properties simultaneously. Besides, HousE is a generalization of existing rotation-based models while extending the rotations to high-dimensional spaces. Empirically, HousE achieves new state-of-the-art performance on five benchmark datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/anrep/HousE.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）的有效性很大程度上取决于对内在关系模式和映射属性进行建模的能力。然而，现有的方法只能捕获其中的一些，建模能力不足。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个更强大的 KGE 框架，名为 HouseE，它涉及一种基于两种 Householder 变换的新颖参数化：（1）Householder 旋转以实现建模关系模式的卓越能力； (2) 家庭投影来处理复杂的关系映射属性。理论上，HousE 能够同时对关键关系模式和映射属性进行建模。此外，HousE 是现有基于旋转的模型的推广，同时将旋转扩展到高维空间。根据经验，HousE 在五个基准数据集上实现了新的最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/anrep/House 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Householder变换的知识图谱嵌入框架HousE，通过改进关系模式建模能力以提升知识图谱嵌入效果。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法在建模关系模式和映射特性方面存在容量不足的问题，难以全面捕捉复杂关系特征。
AI.method: 设计包含两种Householder变换的参数化方法：(1) Householder旋转用于增强关系模式建模能力；(2) Householder投影用于处理复杂映射特性，并将旋转方法扩展到高维空间。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上达到新的最先进水平，代码已开源至GitHub。
AI.conclusion: HousE通过理论建模与实证分析验证了其同时建模关系模式和映射特性的能力，为知识图谱嵌入提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Juliano Pinto,Georg Hess,William Ljungbergh,Yuxuan Xia,Henk Wymeersch,Lennart Svensson
title: Can Deep Learning be Applied to Model-Based Multi-Object Tracking?
title_zh: 深度学习可以应用于基于模型的多目标跟踪吗？
abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is the problem of tracking the state of an unknown and time-varying number of objects using noisy measurements, with important applications such as autonomous driving, tracking animal behavior, defense systems, and others. In recent years, deep learning (DL) has been increasingly used in MOT for improving tracking performance, but mostly in settings where the measurements are high-dimensional and there are no available models of the measurement likelihood and the object dynamics. The model-based setting instead has not attracted as much attention, and it is still unclear if DL methods can outperform traditional model-based Bayesian methods, which are the state of the art (SOTA) in this context. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-based DL tracker and evaluate its performance in the model-based setting, comparing it to SOTA model-based Bayesian methods in a variety of different tasks. Our results show that the proposed DL method can match the performance of the model-based methods in simple tasks, while outperforming them when the task gets more complicated, either due to an increase in the data association complexity, or to stronger nonlinearities of the models of the environment.
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is the problem of tracking the state of an unknown and time-varying number of objects using noisy measurements, with important applications such as autonomous driving, tracking animal behavior, defense systems, and others. In recent years, deep learning (DL) has been increasingly used in MOT for improving tracking performance, but mostly in settings where the measurements are high-dimensional and there are no available models of the measurement likelihood and the object dynamics. The model-based setting instead has not attracted as much attention, and it is still unclear if DL methods can outperform traditional model-based Bayesian methods, which are the state of the art (SOTA) in this context. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-based DL tracker and evaluate its performance in the model-based setting, comparing it to SOTA model-based Bayesian methods in a variety of different tasks. Our results show that the proposed DL method can match the performance of the model-based methods in simple tasks, while outperforming them when the task gets more complicated, either due to an increase in the data association complexity, or to stronger nonlinearities of the models of the environment.
abstract_zh: 多对象跟踪 (MOT) 是使用噪声测量来跟踪未知且随时间变化的多个对象的状态的问题，具有重要的应用，例如自动驾驶、跟踪动物行为、防御系统等。近年来，深度学习（DL）在 MOT 中越来越多地用于提高跟踪性能，但主要是在测量是高维的并且没有可用的测量可能性和对象动态模型的情况下。相反，基于模型的设置并没有引起太多关注，并且目前还不清楚深度学习方法是否能够优于传统的基于模型的贝叶斯方法，而传统的基于模型的贝叶斯方法是这种情况下的最先进技术（SOTA）。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的深度学习跟踪器，并评估其在基于模型的设置中的性能，并将其与各种不同任务中基于 SOTA 模型的贝叶斯方法进行比较。我们的结果表明，所提出的深度学习方法在简单任务中可以与基于模型的方法的性能相匹配，而当任务变得更复杂时，无论是由于数据关联复杂性的增加，还是由于环境模型更强的非线性，其性能都优于基于模型的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨深度学习在基于模型的多目标跟踪（MOT）中的应用，提出一种基于Transformer的深度学习跟踪器，并与传统模型-based贝叶斯方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在MOT中广泛应用，但基于模型的场景（需建模测量似然和动态模型）尚未被充分研究，且深度学习是否优于传统贝叶斯方法尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出一种基于Transformer的深度学习跟踪器，通过多种任务与当前最优的模型-based贝叶斯方法进行性能对比。
AI.result: 在简单任务中，深度学习方法与传统方法性能相当；在数据关联复杂度或环境模型非线性增强的复杂任务中，深度学习方法表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习在复杂模型-based多目标跟踪任务中具有显著优势，可有效处理高非线性或复杂关联场景。

search_text: Can Deep Learning be Applied to Model-Based Multi-Object Tracking? 深度学习可以应用于基于模型的多目标跟踪吗？ Multi-object tracking (MOT) is the problem of tracking the state of an unknown and time-varying number of objects using noisy measurements, with important applications such as autonomous driving, tracking animal behavior, defense systems, and others. In recent years, deep learning (DL) has been increasingly used in MOT for improving tracking performance, but mostly in settings where the measurements are high-dimensional and there are no available models of the measurement likelihood and the object dynamics. The model-based setting instead has not attracted as much attention, and it is still unclear if DL methods can outperform traditional model-based Bayesian methods, which are the state of the art (SOTA) in this context. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-based DL tracker and evaluate its performance in the model-based setting, comparing it to SOTA model-based Bayesian methods in a variety of different tasks. Our results show that the proposed DL method can match the performance of the model-based methods in simple tasks, while outperforming them when the task gets more complicated, either due to an increase in the data association complexity, or to stronger nonlinearities of the models of the environment. 多对象跟踪 (MOT) 是使用噪声测量来跟踪未知且随时间变化的多个对象的状态的问题，具有重要的应用，例如自动驾驶、跟踪动物行为、防御系统等。近年来，深度学习（DL）在 MOT 中越来越多地用于提高跟踪性能，但主要是在测量是高维的并且没有可用的测量可能性和对象动态模型的情况下。相反，基于模型的设置并没有引起太多关注，并且目前还不清楚深度学习方法是否能够优于传统的基于模型的贝叶斯方法，而传统的基于模型的贝叶斯方法是这种情况下的最先进技术（SOTA）。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的深度学习跟踪器，并评估其在基于模型的设置中的性能，并将其与各种不同任务中基于 SOTA 模型的贝叶斯方法进行比较。我们的结果表明，所提出的深度学习方法在简单任务中可以与基于模型的方法的性能相匹配，而当任务变得更复杂时，无论是由于数据关联复杂性的增加，还是由于环境模型更强的非线性，其性能都优于基于模型的方法。 本文探讨深度学习在基于模型的多目标跟踪（MOT）中的应用，提出一种基于Transformer的深度学习跟踪器，并与传统模型-based贝叶斯方法进行比较。 Juliano Pinto,Georg Hess,William Ljungbergh,Yuxuan Xia,Henk Wymeersch,Lennart Svensson cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.SY

authors_text: Tao Wang,Ruibo Fu,Jiangyan Yi,Jianhua Tao,Zhengqi Wen
title: Singing-Tacotron: Global duration control attention and dynamic filter for End-to-end singing voice synthesis
title_zh: Singing-Tacotron：用于端到端歌声合成的全局持续时间控制注意力和动态滤波器
abstract: End-to-end singing voice synthesis (SVS) is attractive due to the avoidance of pre-aligned data. However, the auto learned alignment of singing voice with lyrics is difficult to match the duration information in musical score, which will lead to the model instability or even failure to synthesize voice. To learn accurate alignment information automatically, this paper proposes an end-to-end SVS framework, named Singing-Tacotron. The main difference between the proposed framework and Tacotron is that the speech can be controlled significantly by the musical score's duration information. Firstly, we propose a global duration control attention mechanism for the SVS model. The attention mechanism can control each phoneme's duration. Secondly, a duration encoder is proposed to learn a set of global transition tokens from the musical score. These transition tokens can help the attention mechanism decide whether moving to the next phoneme or staying at each decoding step. Thirdly, to further improve the model's stability, a dynamic filter is designed to help the model overcome noise interference and pay more attention to local context information. Subjective and objective evaluation verify the effectiveness of the method. Furthermore, the role of global transition tokens and the effect of duration control are explored. Examples of experiments can be found at https://hairuo55.github.io/SingingTacotron.
summary: End-to-end singing voice synthesis (SVS) is attractive due to the avoidance of pre-aligned data. However, the auto learned alignment of singing voice with lyrics is difficult to match the duration information in musical score, which will lead to the model instability or even failure to synthesize voice. To learn accurate alignment information automatically, this paper proposes an end-to-end SVS framework, named Singing-Tacotron. The main difference between the proposed framework and Tacotron is that the speech can be controlled significantly by the musical score's duration information. Firstly, we propose a global duration control attention mechanism for the SVS model. The attention mechanism can control each phoneme's duration. Secondly, a duration encoder is proposed to learn a set of global transition tokens from the musical score. These transition tokens can help the attention mechanism decide whether moving to the next phoneme or staying at each decoding step. Thirdly, to further improve the model's stability, a dynamic filter is designed to help the model overcome noise interference and pay more attention to local context information. Subjective and objective evaluation verify the effectiveness of the method. Furthermore, the role of global transition tokens and the effect of duration control are explored. Examples of experiments can be found at https://hairuo55.github.io/SingingTacotron.
abstract_zh: 由于避免了预先对齐的数据，端到端歌声合成（SVS）很有吸引力。然而，自动学习的歌声与歌词的对齐很难匹配乐谱中的时长信息，这将导致模型不稳定甚至无法合成语音。为了自动学习准确的对齐信息，本文提出了一种端到端的SVS框架，名为Singing-Tacotron。所提出的框架与 Tacotron 之间的主要区别在于，语音可以通过乐谱的持续时间信息进行显着控制。首先，我们为 SVS 模型提出了一种全局持续时间控制注意力机制。注意力机制可以控制每个音素的持续时间。其次，提出了一个持续时间编码器来从乐谱中学习一组全局转换标记。这些转换标记可以帮助注意力机制决定是移动到下一个音素还是停留在每个解码步骤。第三，为了进一步提高模型的稳定性，设计了动态滤波器来帮助模型克服噪声干扰并更加关注局部上下文信息。主客观评价验证了该方法的有效性。此外，还探讨了全局转换代币的作用和持续时间控制的效果。实验示例可以在 https://hairuo55.github.io/SingingTacotron 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的歌唱语音合成框架Singing-Tacotron，通过全局时长控制注意力机制和动态滤波器解决歌词与乐谱时长对齐难题。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端歌唱语音合成模型难以自动学习歌词与乐谱时长信息的对齐，导致模型不稳定或合成失败。
AI.method: 提出全局时长控制注意力机制控制音素时长，设计时长编码器学习乐谱的全局转换标记，并引入动态滤波器增强局部上下文感知能力。
AI.result: 主观和客观评估验证了方法有效性，实验探索了全局转换标记的作用及时长控制效果。
AI.conclusion: Singing-Tacotron框架通过乐谱时长信息的显式控制，显著提升了歌唱语音合成的对齐精度与模型稳定性。

search_text: Singing-Tacotron: Global duration control attention and dynamic filter for End-to-end singing voice synthesis Singing-Tacotron：用于端到端歌声合成的全局持续时间控制注意力和动态滤波器 End-to-end singing voice synthesis (SVS) is attractive due to the avoidance of pre-aligned data. Thirdly, to further improve the model's stability, a dynamic filter is designed to help the model overcome noise interference and pay more attention to local context information. Subjective and objective evaluation verify the effectiveness of the method. Furthermore, the role of global transition tokens and the effect of duration control are explored. authors_text: Sijie Zhuo,Robert Biddle,Yun Sing Koh,Danielle Lottridge,Giovanni Russello
title: SoK: Human-Centered Phishing Susceptibility
title_zh: SoK：以人为中心的网络钓鱼易感性
comment: 13 pages of content, 2 figures, 18 pages in total
comments: 13 pages of content, 2 figures, 18 pages in total
abstract: Phishing is recognised as a serious threat to organisations and individuals. While there have been significant technical advances in blocking phishing attacks, people remain the last line of defence after phishing emails reach their email client. Most of the existing literature on this subject has focused on the technical aspects related to phishing. However, the factors that cause humans to be susceptible to phishing attacks are still not well-understood. To fill this gap, we reviewed the available literature and we propose a three-stage Phishing Susceptibility Model (PSM) for explaining how humans are involved in phishing detection and prevention, and we systematically investigate the phishing susceptibility variables studied in the literature and taxonomize them using our model. This model reveals several research gaps that need to be addressed to improve users' detection performance. We also propose a practical impact assessment of the value of studying the phishing susceptibility variables, and quality of evidence criteria. These can serve as guidelines for future research to improve experiment design, result quality, and increase the reliability and generalizability of findings.
summary: Phishing is recognised as a serious threat to organisations and individuals. While there have been significant technical advances in blocking phishing attacks, people remain the last line of defence after phishing emails reach their email client. Most of the existing literature on this subject has focused on the technical aspects related to phishing. However, the factors that cause humans to be susceptible to phishing attacks are still not well-understood. To fill this gap, we reviewed the available literature and we propose a three-stage Phishing Susceptibility Model (PSM) for explaining how humans are involved in phishing detection and prevention, and we systematically investigate the phishing susceptibility variables studied in the literature and taxonomize them using our model. This model reveals several research gaps that need to be addressed to improve users' detection performance. We also propose a practical impact assessment of the value of studying the phishing susceptibility variables, and quality of evidence criteria. These can serve as guidelines for future research to improve experiment design, result quality, and increase the reliability and generalizability of findings.
abstract_zh: 网络钓鱼被认为是对组织和个人的严重威胁。尽管在阻止网络钓鱼攻击方面取得了重大技术进步，但在网络钓鱼电子邮件到达电子邮件客户端后，人们仍然是最后一道防线。关于该主题的大多数现有文献都集中在与网络钓鱼相关的技术方面。然而，导致人类容易受到网络钓鱼攻击的因素仍不清楚。为了填补这一空白，我们回顾了现有文献，提出了一个三阶段网络钓鱼易感性模型（PSM）来解释人类如何参与网络钓鱼检测和预防，我们系统地研究了文献中研究的网络钓鱼易感性变量，并使用我们的模型对它们进行分类。该模型揭示了一些需要解决的研究空白，以提高用户的检测性能。我们还建议对研究网络钓鱼易感性变量的价值和证据质量标准进行实际影响评估。这些可以作为未来研究的指南，以改进实验设计、结果质量并提高研究结果的可靠性和普遍性。

AI.tldr: 提出三阶段钓鱼易感性模型，分析人类因素在钓鱼攻击中的作用及研究空白。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重技术防御，人类易感性因素理解不足，需系统分析以改进检测效果。
AI.method: 通过文献综述构建三阶段模型，分类分析钓鱼易感性变量，并提出评估标准。
AI.result: 识别出研究空白，提出变量影响评估及证据质量标准，为未来研究提供指南。
AI.conclusion: 需解决识别出的空白以提升检测性能，研究指南有助于提高实验设计和结果可靠性。

authors_text: Felix Ott,David Rügamer,Lucas Heublein,Bernd Bischl,Christopher Mutschler
title: Auxiliary Cross-Modal Representation Learning with Triplet Loss Functions for Online Handwriting Recognition
title_zh: 用于在线手写识别的具有三元组损失函数的辅助跨模态表示学习
abstract: Cross-modal representation learning learns a shared embedding between two or more modalities to improve performance in a given task compared to using only one of the modalities. Cross-modal representation learning from different data types -- such as images and time-series data (e.g., audio or text data) -- requires a deep metric learning loss that minimizes the distance between the modality embeddings. In this paper, we propose to use the contrastive or triplet loss, which uses positive and negative identities to create sample pairs with different labels, for cross-modal representation learning between image and time-series modalities (CMR-IS). By adapting the triplet loss for cross-modal representation learning, higher accuracy in the main (time-series classification) task can be achieved by exploiting additional information of the auxiliary (image classification) task. We present a triplet loss with a dynamic margin for single label and sequence-to-sequence classification tasks. We perform extensive evaluations on synthetic image and time-series data, and on data for offline handwriting recognition (HWR) and on online HWR from sensor-enhanced pens for classifying written words. Our experiments show an improved classification accuracy, faster convergence, and better generalizability due to an improved cross-modal representation. Furthermore, the more suitable generalizability leads to a better adaptability between writers for online HWR.
summary: Cross-modal representation learning learns a shared embedding between two or more modalities to improve performance in a given task compared to using only one of the modalities. Cross-modal representation learning from different data types -- such as images and time-series data (e.g., audio or text data) -- requires a deep metric learning loss that minimizes the distance between the modality embeddings. In this paper, we propose to use the contrastive or triplet loss, which uses positive and negative identities to create sample pairs with different labels, for cross-modal representation learning between image and time-series modalities (CMR-IS). By adapting the triplet loss for cross-modal representation learning, higher accuracy in the main (time-series classification) task can be achieved by exploiting additional information of the auxiliary (image classification) task. We present a triplet loss with a dynamic margin for single label and sequence-to-sequence classification tasks. We perform extensive evaluations on synthetic image and time-series data, and on data for offline handwriting recognition (HWR) and on online HWR from sensor-enhanced pens for classifying written words. Our experiments show an improved classification accuracy, faster convergence, and better generalizability due to an improved cross-modal representation. Furthermore, the more suitable generalizability leads to a better adaptability between writers for online HWR.
abstract_zh: 与仅使用其中一种模态相比，跨模态表示学习学习两种或多种模态之间的共享嵌入，以提高给定任务的性能。从不同数据类型（例如图像和时间序列数据（例如音频或文本数据））进行跨模态表示学习需要深度度量学习损失，以最小化模态嵌入之间的距离。在本文中，我们建议使用对比损失或三元组损失，它使用正负身份来创建具有不同标签的样本对，用于图像和时间序列模态（CMR-IS）之间的跨模态表示学习。通过采用跨模态表示学习的三元组损失，可以通过利用辅助（图像分类）任务的附加信息来实现主要（时间序列分类）任务的更高准确度。我们为单标签和序列到序列分类任务提供了具有动态余量的三元组损失。我们对合成图像和时间序列数据、离线手写识别 (HWR) 数据以及来自传感器增强型笔的在线 HWR 数据进行广泛的评估，以对书面文字进行分类。我们的实验表明，由于改进的跨模态表示，分类精度得到了提高，收敛速度更快，泛化能力也更好。此外，更合适的通用性导致在线 HWR 的作者之间更好的适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用三元组损失函数进行跨模态表示学习，以提升在线手写识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 跨模态表示学习可通过融合图像与时间序列模态信息提升任务表现，但现有方法在动态边际调整和序列分类任务适配性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计动态边际三元组损失函数，结合图像分类（辅助任务）与时间序列分类（主任务）的跨模态嵌入学习，适用于单标签与序列到序列分类场景。
AI.result: 在合成数据与真实手写数据集上实现分类准确率提升、收敛速度加快及跨写作者适应性增强，尤其在线上手写识别中表现显著。
AI.conclusion: 动态边际三元组损失有效提升了跨模态表示学习性能，为多模态手写识别任务提供了更优的嵌入学习框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用三元组损失函数进行跨模态表示学习，以提升在线手写识别任务的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 跨模态表示学习可通过融合图像与时间序列模态信息提升任务表现，但现有方法在动态边际调整和序列分类任务适配性方面存在不足。
ai_content.method: 设计动态边际三元组损失函数，结合图像分类（辅助任务）与时间序列分类（主任务）的跨模态嵌入学习，适用于单标签与序列到序列分类场景。
ai_content.result: 在合成数据与真实手写数据集上实现分类准确率提升、收敛速度加快及跨写作者适应性增强，尤其在线上手写识别中表现显著。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态边际三元组损失有效提升了跨模态表示学习性能，为多模态手写识别任务提供了更优的嵌入学习框架。

search_text: Auxiliary Cross-Modal Representation Learning with Triplet Loss Functions for Online Handwriting Recognition 用于在线手写识别的具有三元组损失函数的辅助跨模态表示学习 Cross-modal representation learning learns a shared embedding between two or more modalities to improve performance in a given task compared to using only one of the modalities. Cross-modal representation learning from different data types -- such as images and time-series data (e.g., audio or text data) -- requires a deep metric learning loss that minimizes the distance between the modality embeddings. In this paper, we propose to use the contrastive or triplet loss, which uses positive and negative identities to create sample pairs with different labels, for cross-modal representation learning between image and time-series modalities (CMR-IS). By adapting the triplet loss for cross-modal representation learning, higher accuracy in the main (time-series classification) task can be achieved by exploiting additional information of the auxiliary (image classification) task. We present a triplet loss with a dynamic margin for single label and sequence-to-sequence classification tasks. We perform extensive evaluations on synthetic image and time-series data, and on data for offline handwriting recognition (HWR) and on online HWR from sensor-enhanced pens for classifying written words. Our experiments show an improved classification accuracy, faster convergence, and better generalizability due to an improved cross-modal representation. Furthermore, the more suitable generalizability leads to a better adaptability between writers for online HWR. 与仅使用其中一种模态相比，跨模态表示学习学习两种或多种模态之间的共享嵌入，以提高给定任务的性能。从不同数据类型（例如图像和时间序列数据（例如音频或文本数据））进行跨模态表示学习需要深度度量学习损失，以最小化模态嵌入之间的距离。在本文中，我们建议使用对比损失或三元组损失，它使用正负身份来创建具有不同标签的样本对，用于图像和时间序列模态（CMR-IS）之间的跨模态表示学习。通过采用跨模态表示学习的三元组损失，可以通过利用辅助（图像分类）任务的附加信息来实现主要（时间序列分类）任务的更高准确度。我们为单标签和序列到序列分类任务提供了具有动态余量的三元组损失。我们对合成图像和时间序列数据、离线手写识别 (HWR) 数据以及来自传感器增强型笔的在线 HWR 数据进行广泛的评估，以对书面文字进行分类。我们的实验表明，由于改进的跨模态表示，分类精度得到了提高，收敛速度更快，泛化能力也更好。此外，更合适的通用性导致在线 HWR 的作者之间更好的适应性。 本文提出利用三元组损失函数进行跨模态表示学习，以提升在线手写识别任务的性能。 Felix Ott,David Rügamer,Lucas Heublein,Bernd Bischl,Christopher Mutschler cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Knowledge Transfer from Large-scale Pretrained Language Models to End-to-end Speech Recognizers
title_zh: 从大规模预训练语言模型到端到端语音识别器的知识转移
abstract: End-to-end speech recognition is a promising technology for enabling compact automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems since it can unify the acoustic and language model into a single neural network. However, as a drawback, training of end-to-end speech recognizers always requires transcribed utterances. Since end-to-end models are also known to be severely data hungry, this constraint is crucial especially because obtaining transcribed utterances is costly and can possibly be impractical or impossible. This paper proposes a method for alleviating this issue by transferring knowledge from a language model neural network that can be pretrained with text-only data. Specifically, this paper attempts to transfer semantic knowledge acquired in embedding vectors of large-scale language models. Since embedding vectors can be assumed as implicit representations of linguistic information such as part-of-speech, intent, and so on, those are also expected to be useful modeling cues for ASR decoders. This paper extends two types of ASR decoders, attention-based decoders and neural transducers, by modifying training loss functions to include embedding prediction terms. The proposed systems were shown to be effective for error rate reduction without incurring extra computational costs in the decoding phase.
summary: End-to-end speech recognition is a promising technology for enabling compact automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems since it can unify the acoustic and language model into a single neural network. However, as a drawback, training of end-to-end speech recognizers always requires transcribed utterances. Since end-to-end models are also known to be severely data hungry, this constraint is crucial especially because obtaining transcribed utterances is costly and can possibly be impractical or impossible. This paper proposes a method for alleviating this issue by transferring knowledge from a language model neural network that can be pretrained with text-only data. Specifically, this paper attempts to transfer semantic knowledge acquired in embedding vectors of large-scale language models. Since embedding vectors can be assumed as implicit representations of linguistic information such as part-of-speech, intent, and so on, those are also expected to be useful modeling cues for ASR decoders. This paper extends two types of ASR decoders, attention-based decoders and neural transducers, by modifying training loss functions to include embedding prediction terms. The proposed systems were shown to be effective for error rate reduction without incurring extra computational costs in the decoding phase.
abstract_zh: 端到端语音识别是一项有前途的技术，可实现紧凑型自动语音识别（ASR）系统，因为它可以将声学和语言模型统一到单个神经网络中。然而，作为一个缺点，端到端语音识别器的训练总是需要转录的话语。由于众所周知，端到端模型非常需要数据，因此这种约束至关重要，特别是因为获得转录的话语成本高昂，并且可能不切实际或不可能。本文提出了一种通过从可以使用纯文本数据进行预训练的语言模型神经网络转移知识来缓解此问题的方法。具体来说，本文尝试迁移在大规模语言模型的嵌入向量中获得的语​​义知识。由于嵌入向量可以被假定为语言信息（例如词性、意图等）的隐式表示，因此这些向量也有望成为 ASR 解码器的有用建模线索。本文通过修改训练损失函数以包含嵌入预测项，扩展了两种类型的 ASR 解码器：基于注意力的解码器和神经换能器。所提出的系统被证明可以有效降低错误率，并且不会在解码阶段产生额外的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过从大规模预训练语言模型中迁移知识来缓解端到端语音识别系统的数据需求问题。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音识别系统需要大量带转录的语音数据进行训练，而获取这些数据成本高昂且可能不可行。
AI.method: 通过修改训练损失函数，将大规模语言模型的嵌入向量预测项引入注意力机制解码器和神经转录器，实现语义知识迁移。
AI.result: 在无需额外解码成本的情况下，该方法有效降低了语音识别错误率。
AI.conclusion: 利用预训练语言模型的嵌入知识可提升端到端语音识别性能，减少对标注数据的依赖。

title: An Optimal-Time RLBWT Construction in BWT-runs Bounded Space
title_zh: BWT 运行有界空间中的最优时间 RLBWT 构造
abstract: The compression of highly repetitive strings (i.e., strings with many repetitions) has been a central research topic in string processing, and quite a few compression methods for these strings have been proposed thus far. Among them, an efficient compression format gathering increasing attention is the run-length Burrows--Wheeler transform (RLBWT), which is a run-length encoded BWT as a reversible permutation of an input string on the lexicographical order of suffixes. State-of-the-art construction algorithms of RLBWT have a serious issue with respect to (i) non-optimal computation time or (ii) a working space that is linearly proportional to the length of an input string. In this paper, we present \emph{r-comp}, the first optimal-time construction algorithm of RLBWT in BWT-runs bounded space. That is, the computational complexity of r-comp is $O(n + r \log{r})$ time and $O(r\log{n})$ bits of working space for the length $n$ of an input string and the number $r$ of equal-letter runs in BWT. The computation time is optimal (i.e., $O(n)$) for strings with the property $r=O(n/\log{n})$, which holds for most highly repetitive strings. Experiments using a real-world dataset of highly repetitive strings show the effectiveness of r-comp with respect to computation time and space.
summary: The compression of highly repetitive strings (i.e., strings with many repetitions) has been a central research topic in string processing, and quite a few compression methods for these strings have been proposed thus far. Among them, an efficient compression format gathering increasing attention is the run-length Burrows--Wheeler transform (RLBWT), which is a run-length encoded BWT as a reversible permutation of an input string on the lexicographical order of suffixes. State-of-the-art construction algorithms of RLBWT have a serious issue with respect to (i) non-optimal computation time or (ii) a working space that is linearly proportional to the length of an input string. In this paper, we present \emph{r-comp}, the first optimal-time construction algorithm of RLBWT in BWT-runs bounded space. That is, the computational complexity of r-comp is $O(n + r \log{r})$ time and $O(r\log{n})$ bits of working space for the length $n$ of an input string and the number $r$ of equal-letter runs in BWT. The computation time is optimal (i.e., $O(n)$) for strings with the property $r=O(n/\log{n})$, which holds for most highly repetitive strings. Experiments using a real-world dataset of highly repetitive strings show the effectiveness of r-comp with respect to computation time and space.
abstract_zh: 高度重复字符串（即具有多次重复的字符串）的压缩一直是字符串处理的中心研究课题，迄今为止已经提出了很多针对这些字符串的压缩方法。其中，一种越来越受到关注的高效压缩格式是游程长度Burrows-Wheeler变换（RLBWT），它是一种游程编码的BWT，作为输入字符串在后缀字典顺序上的可逆排列。最先进的 RLBWT 构造算法在以下方面存在严重问题：(i) 非最佳计算时间或 (ii) 与输入字符串长度成线性比例的工作空间。在本文中，我们提出了 \emph{r-comp}，这是 BWT 运行有界空间中 RLBWT 的第一个最佳时间构造算法。也就是说，对于输入字符串的长度 $n$ 和 BWT 中等字母运行的数量 $r$，r-comp 的计算复杂度为 $O(n + r \log{r})$ 时间和 $O(r\log{n})$ 位工作空间。对于具有属性 $r=O(n/\log{n})$ 的字符串来说，计算时间是最佳的（即 $O(n)$），这适用于大多数高度重复的字符串。使用高度重复字符串的真实数据集进行的实验表明了 r-comp 在计算时间和空间方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在BWT-runs受限空间内以最优时间构建RLBWT的算法r-comp。
AI.motivation: 现有RLBWT构建算法存在计算时间非最优或工作空间与输入字符串长度线性相关的缺陷，需针对高度重复字符串设计更高效方法。
AI.method: 设计r-comp算法，时间复杂度为O(n + r log r)，空间复杂度为O(r log n)位，利用BWT中相同字符运行的特性优化存储与计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，r-comp在实际高度重复字符串数据集上有效提升了计算速度与空间效率。
AI.conclusion: r-comp是首个在BWT-runs空间限制下实现最优时间复杂度的RLBWT构建算法，适用于高度重复字符串的压缩场景。

State-of-the-art construction algorithms of RLBWT have a serious issue with respect to (i) non-optimal computation time or (ii) a working space that is linearly proportional to the length of an input string. In this paper, we present \emph{r-comp}, the first optimal-time construction algorithm of RLBWT in BWT-runs bounded space. That is, the computational complexity of r-comp is $O(n + r \log{r})$ time and $O(r\log{n})$ bits of working space for the length $n$ of an input string and the number $r$ of equal-letter runs in BWT. The computation time is optimal (i.e., $O(n)$) for strings with the property $r=O(n/\log{n})$, which holds for most highly repetitive strings. Experiments using a real-world dataset of highly repetitive strings show the effectiveness of r-comp with respect to computation time and space. 高度重复字符串（即具有多次重复的字符串）的压缩一直是字符串处理的中心研究课题，迄今为止已经提出了很多针对这些字符串的压缩方法。其中，一种越来越受到关注的高效压缩格式是游程长度Burrows-Wheeler变换（RLBWT），它是一种游程编码的BWT，作为输入字符串在后缀字典顺序上的可逆排列。最先进的 RLBWT 构造算法在以下方面存在严重问题：(i) 非最佳计算时间或 (ii) 与输入字符串长度成线性比例的工作空间。在本文中，我们提出了 \emph{r-comp}，这是 BWT 运行有界空间中 RLBWT 的第一个最佳时间构造算法。也就是说，对于输入字符串的长度 $n$ 和 BWT 中等字母运行的数量 $r$，r-comp 的计算复杂度为 $O(n + r \log{r})$ 时间和 $O(r\log{n})$ 位工作空间。对于具有属性 $r=O(n/\log{n})$ 的字符串来说，计算时间是最佳的（即 $O(n)$），这适用于大多数高度重复的字符串。使用高度重复字符串的真实数据集进行的实验表明了 r-comp 在计算时间和空间方面的有效性。 本文提出了一种在BWT-runs受限空间内以最优时间构建RLBWT的算法r-comp。 Takaaki Nishimoto,Shunsuke Kanda,Yasuo Tabei cs.DS

title: IPD:An Incremental Prototype based DBSCAN for large-scale data with cluster representatives
title_zh: IPD：基于增量原型的 DBSCAN，用于具有集群代表的大规模数据
abstract: DBSCAN is a fundamental density-based clustering technique that identifies any arbitrary shape of the clusters. However, it becomes infeasible while handling big data. On the other hand, centroid-based clustering is important for detecting patterns in a dataset since unprocessed data points can be labeled to their nearest centroid. However, it can not detect non-spherical clusters. For a large data, it is not feasible to store and compute labels of every samples. These can be done as and when the information is required. The purpose can be accomplished when clustering act as a tool to identify cluster representatives and query is served by assigning cluster labels of nearest representative. In this paper, we propose an Incremental Prototype-based DBSCAN (IPD) algorithm which is designed to identify arbitrary-shaped clusters for large-scale data. Additionally, it chooses a set of representatives for each cluster.
summary: DBSCAN is a fundamental density-based clustering technique that identifies any arbitrary shape of the clusters. However, it becomes infeasible while handling big data. On the other hand, centroid-based clustering is important for detecting patterns in a dataset since unprocessed data points can be labeled to their nearest centroid. However, it can not detect non-spherical clusters. For a large data, it is not feasible to store and compute labels of every samples. These can be done as and when the information is required. The purpose can be accomplished when clustering act as a tool to identify cluster representatives and query is served by assigning cluster labels of nearest representative. In this paper, we propose an Incremental Prototype-based DBSCAN (IPD) algorithm which is designed to identify arbitrary-shaped clusters for large-scale data. Additionally, it chooses a set of representatives for each cluster.
abstract_zh: DBSCAN 是一种基于密度的基本聚类技术，可识别任意形状的聚类。然而，在处理大数据时，它变得不可行。另一方面，基于质心的聚类对于检测数据集中的模式非常重要，因为未处理的数据点可以标记到它们最近的质心。但是，它无法检测非球形簇。对于大数据，存储和计算每个样本的标签是不可行的。这些可以在需要信息时完成。当聚类作为识别聚类代表的工具并且通过分配最近代表的聚类标签来服务查询时，可以实现该目的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于增量原型的 DBSCAN (IPD) 算法，该算法旨在识别大规模数据的任意形状的簇。此外，它还为每个集群选择一组代表。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于增量原型的DBSCAN算法（IPD），用于处理大规模数据集并识别任意形状的聚类，同时选择每个聚类的代表点。
AI.motivation: 传统DBSCAN在处理大规模数据时效率低下，而基于质心的聚类方法无法检测非球形聚类，且无法高效存储和计算所有样本标签。
AI.method: 通过增量式处理数据，结合原型点选择机制，IPD算法在无需存储全部样本的情况下，利用聚类代表点分配标签以提高计算效率。
AI.result: IPD算法能够有效处理大规模数据集，同时保持对任意形状聚类的识别能力，并通过代表点减少计算和存储开销。
AI.conclusion: IPD算法为大规模数据的密度聚类提供了高效解决方案，通过原型点机制平衡了聚类精度与计算资源消耗。

title: Automating the Learning of Inverse Kinematics for Robotic Arms with Redundant DoFs
title_zh: 自动学习具有冗余自由度的机械臂逆运动学
abstract: Inverse Kinematics (IK) solves the problem of mapping from the Cartesian space to the joint configuration space of a robotic arm. It has a wide range of applications in areas such as computer graphics, protein structure prediction, and robotics. With the vast advances of artificial neural networks (NNs), many researchers recently turned to data-driven approaches to solving the IK problem. Unfortunately, NNs become inadequate for robotic arms with redundant Degrees-of-Freedom (DoFs). This is because such arms may have multiple angle solutions to reach the same desired pose, while typical NNs only implement one-to-one mapping functions, which associate just one consistent output for a given input. In order to train usable NNs to solve the IK problem, most existing works employ customized training datasets, in which every desired pose only has one angle solution. This inevitably limits the generalization and automation of the proposed approaches. This paper breaks through at two fronts: (1) a systematic and mechanical approach to training data collection that covers the entire working space of the robotic arm, and can be fully automated and done only once after the arm is developed; and (2) a novel NN-based framework that can leverage the redundant DoFs to produce multiple angle solutions to any given desired pose of the robotic arm. The latter is especially useful for robotic applications such as obstacle avoidance and posture imitation.
summary: Inverse Kinematics (IK) solves the problem of mapping from the Cartesian space to the joint configuration space of a robotic arm. It has a wide range of applications in areas such as computer graphics, protein structure prediction, and robotics. With the vast advances of artificial neural networks (NNs), many researchers recently turned to data-driven approaches to solving the IK problem. Unfortunately, NNs become inadequate for robotic arms with redundant Degrees-of-Freedom (DoFs). This is because such arms may have multiple angle solutions to reach the same desired pose, while typical NNs only implement one-to-one mapping functions, which associate just one consistent output for a given input. In order to train usable NNs to solve the IK problem, most existing works employ customized training datasets, in which every desired pose only has one angle solution. This inevitably limits the generalization and automation of the proposed approaches. This paper breaks through at two fronts: (1) a systematic and mechanical approach to training data collection that covers the entire working space of the robotic arm, and can be fully automated and done only once after the arm is developed; and (2) a novel NN-based framework that can leverage the redundant DoFs to produce multiple angle solutions to any given desired pose of the robotic arm. The latter is especially useful for robotic applications such as obstacle avoidance and posture imitation.
abstract_zh: 逆运动学（IK）解决了从笛卡尔空间到机械臂关节配置空间的映射问题。它在计算机图形学、蛋白质结构预测和机器人技术等领域有着广泛的应用。随着人工神经网络 (NN) 的巨大进步，许多研究人员最近转向数据驱动的方法来解决 IK 问题。不幸的是，神经网络对于具有冗余自由度（DoF）的机械臂来说是不够的。这是因为此类手臂可能具有多个角度解决方案来达到相同的所需姿势，而典型的神经网络仅实现一对一的映射函数，该函数仅将给定输入的一个一致输出关联起来。为了训练可用的神经网络来解决 IK 问题，大多数现有工作都采用定制的训练数据集，其中每个所需的姿势只有一个角度解。这不可避免地限制了所提出方法的泛化和自动化。本文在两个方面取得了突破：（1）一种系统化、机械化的训练数据收集方法，覆盖了机械臂的整个工作空间，并且可以完全自动化，并且只需在机械臂开发完成后一次即可完成； (2) 一种新颖的基于神经网络的框架，可以利用冗余自由度为机械臂的任何给定所需姿势生成多个角度解决方案。后者对于避障和姿势模仿等机器人应用特别有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化学习冗余自由度机械臂逆运动学的神经网络框架，解决了传统方法在处理多解问题时的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在处理具有冗余自由度的机械臂逆运动学问题时，因仅能实现一对一映射而无法生成多解，且现有数据集局限于单一解，限制了方法的泛化性和自动化能力。
AI.method: （1）设计了一种系统化的自动化数据采集方法，覆盖机械臂整个工作空间；（2）提出基于神经网络的新框架，利用冗余自由度生成多组角度解。
AI.result: 实现了数据采集的自动化，并开发出可生成多解的神经网络模型，有效支持避障和姿态模仿等应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统逆运动学求解的局限性，提升了冗余自由度机械臂在复杂场景下的适应性与自动化水平。

title: Practical Network Acceleration with Tiny Sets
title_zh: 使用 Tiny Sets 实现实用网络加速
abstract: Due to data privacy issues, accelerating networks with tiny training sets has become a critical need in practice. Previous methods mainly adopt filter-level pruning to accelerate networks with scarce training samples. In this paper, we reveal that dropping blocks is a fundamentally superior approach in this scenario. It enjoys a higher acceleration ratio and results in a better latency-accuracy performance under the few-shot setting. To choose which blocks to drop, we propose a new concept namely recoverability to measure the difficulty of recovering the compressed network. Our recoverability is efficient and effective for choosing which blocks to drop. Finally, we propose an algorithm named PRACTISE to accelerate networks using only tiny sets of training images. PRACTISE outperforms previous methods by a significant margin. For 22% latency reduction, PRACTISE surpasses previous methods by on average 7% on ImageNet-1k. It also enjoys high generalization ability, working well under data-free or out-of-domain data settings, too. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise.
summary: Due to data privacy issues, accelerating networks with tiny training sets has become a critical need in practice. Previous methods mainly adopt filter-level pruning to accelerate networks with scarce training samples. In this paper, we reveal that dropping blocks is a fundamentally superior approach in this scenario. It enjoys a higher acceleration ratio and results in a better latency-accuracy performance under the few-shot setting. To choose which blocks to drop, we propose a new concept namely recoverability to measure the difficulty of recovering the compressed network. Our recoverability is efficient and effective for choosing which blocks to drop. Finally, we propose an algorithm named PRACTISE to accelerate networks using only tiny sets of training images. PRACTISE outperforms previous methods by a significant margin. For 22% latency reduction, PRACTISE surpasses previous methods by on average 7% on ImageNet-1k. It also enjoys high generalization ability, working well under data-free or out-of-domain data settings, too. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise.
abstract_zh: 由于数据隐私问题，使用小型训练集加速网络已成为实践中的关键需求。以前的方法主要采用过滤器级剪枝来加速训练样本稀缺的网络。在本文中，我们揭示了在这种情况下，丢弃块是一种根本上优越的方法。它具有更高的加速比，并且在少样本设置下具有更好的延迟精度性能。为了选择要丢弃的块，我们提出了一个新概念，即可恢复性来衡量恢复压缩网络的难度。我们的可恢复性对于选择要删除的块来说是高效且有效的。最后，我们提出了一种名为 PRACTICE 的算法，仅使用少量训练图像来加速网络。 PRACTICE 的性能明显优于以前的方法。 PRACTICE 在 ImageNet-1k 上平均比之前的方法提高了 7%，延迟降低了 22%。它还具有很高的泛化能力，在无数据或域外数据设置下也能很好地工作。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise。

AI.motivation: 由于数据隐私问题，使用少量训练样本加速网络成为实际需求，而现有滤波器级剪枝方法在小样本场景下效果有限。
AI.method: 提出基于网络块删除的加速方法，引入可恢复性指标选择删除块，并设计PRACTISE算法实现仅用少量训练图像的网络加速。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k数据集上实现22%的延迟降低，平均超越现有方法7%，且在无数据或跨域场景下具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PRACTISE算法通过块级删除和可恢复性指标，在小样本场景下实现了更优的加速-精度平衡，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Practical Network Acceleration with Tiny Sets 使用 Tiny Sets 实现实用网络加速 Due to data privacy issues, accelerating networks with tiny training sets has become a critical need in practice. Previous methods mainly adopt filter-level pruning to accelerate networks with scarce training samples. In this paper, we reveal that dropping blocks is a fundamentally superior approach in this scenario. It enjoys a higher acceleration ratio and results in a better latency-accuracy performance under the few-shot setting. To choose which blocks to drop, we propose a new concept namely recoverability to measure the difficulty of recovering the compressed network. Our recoverability is efficient and effective for choosing which blocks to drop. Finally, we propose an algorithm named PRACTISE to accelerate networks using only tiny sets of training images. PRACTISE outperforms previous methods by a significant margin. For 22% latency reduction, PRACTISE surpasses previous methods by on average 7% on ImageNet-1k. It also enjoys high generalization ability, working well under data-free or out-of-domain data settings, too. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise. 由于数据隐私问题，使用小型训练集加速网络已成为实践中的关键需求。以前的方法主要采用过滤器级剪枝来加速训练样本稀缺的网络。在本文中，我们揭示了在这种情况下，丢弃块是一种根本上优越的方法。它具有更高的加速比，并且在少样本设置下具有更好的延迟精度性能。为了选择要丢弃的块，我们提出了一个新概念，即可恢复性来衡量恢复压缩网络的难度。我们的可恢复性对于选择要删除的块来说是高效且有效的。最后，我们提出了一种名为 PRACTICE 的算法，仅使用少量训练图像来加速网络。 PRACTICE 的性能明显优于以前的方法。 PRACTICE 在 ImageNet-1k 上平均比之前的方法提高了 7%，延迟降低了 22%。它还具有很高的泛化能力，在无数据或域外数据设置下也能很好地工作。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise。 本文提出了一种在小训练集下加速神经网络的新方法，通过删除网络块而非传统滤波器剪枝来实现高效加速。 Guo-Hua Wang,Jianxin Wu cs.CV,cs.AI

title: SRP-DNN: Learning Direct-Path Phase Difference for Multiple Moving Sound Source Localization
title_zh: SRP-DNN：学习直接路径相位差以实现多个移动声源定位
abstract: Multiple moving sound source localization in real-world scenarios remains a challenging issue due to interaction between sources, time-varying trajectories, distorted spatial cues, etc. In this work, we propose to use deep learning techniques to learn competing and time-varying direct-path phase differences for localizing multiple moving sound sources. A causal convolutional recurrent neural network is designed to extract the direct-path phase difference sequence from signals of each microphone pair. To avoid the assignment ambiguity and the problem of uncertain output-dimension encountered when simultaneously predicting multiple targets, the learning target is designed in a weighted sum format, which encodes source activity in the weight and direct-path phase differences in the summed value. The learned direct-path phase differences for all microphone pairs can be directly used to construct the spatial spectrum according to the formulation of steered response power (SRP). This deep neural network (DNN) based SRP method is referred to as SRP-DNN. The locations of sources are estimated by iteratively detecting and removing the dominant source from the spatial spectrum, in which way the interaction between sources is reduced. Experimental results on both simulated and real-world data show the superiority of the proposed method in the presence of noise and reverberation.
summary: Multiple moving sound source localization in real-world scenarios remains a challenging issue due to interaction between sources, time-varying trajectories, distorted spatial cues, etc. In this work, we propose to use deep learning techniques to learn competing and time-varying direct-path phase differences for localizing multiple moving sound sources. A causal convolutional recurrent neural network is designed to extract the direct-path phase difference sequence from signals of each microphone pair. To avoid the assignment ambiguity and the problem of uncertain output-dimension encountered when simultaneously predicting multiple targets, the learning target is designed in a weighted sum format, which encodes source activity in the weight and direct-path phase differences in the summed value. The learned direct-path phase differences for all microphone pairs can be directly used to construct the spatial spectrum according to the formulation of steered response power (SRP). This deep neural network (DNN) based SRP method is referred to as SRP-DNN. The locations of sources are estimated by iteratively detecting and removing the dominant source from the spatial spectrum, in which way the interaction between sources is reduced. Experimental results on both simulated and real-world data show the superiority of the proposed method in the presence of noise and reverberation.
abstract_zh: 由于声源之间的相互作用、时变轨迹、扭曲的空间线索等，现实场景中的多个移动声源定位仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们建议使用深度学习技术来学习竞争性和时变直接路径相位差，以定位多个移动声源。设计因果卷积递归神经网络来从每个麦克风对的信号中提取直接路径相位差序列。为了避免同时预测多个目标时遇到的分配模糊性和输出维度不确定的问题，学习目标被设计为加权求和格式，将源活动编码在权重中，将直接路径相位差编码在求和值中。学习到的所有麦克风对的直接路径相位差可以直接用于根据受控响应功率（SRP）的公式构建空间频谱。这种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的SRP方法被称为SRP-DNN。通过迭代地检测并从空间谱中移除主要源来估计源的位置，通过这种方式减少源之间的相互作用。模拟和真实数据的实验结果表明，该方法在存在噪声和混响的情况下具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRP-DNN方法，通过深度学习直接路径相位差实现多移动声源定位。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中多移动声源定位因声源干扰、轨迹变化及空间线索失真而面临挑战，传统方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 设计因果卷积循环神经网络提取麦克风对信号的直接路径相位差序列，并采用加权求和目标函数编码声源活动与相位差，结合SRP算法构建空间谱实现定位。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据实验中，该方法在噪声和混响环境下均表现出优于现有方法的定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习直接路径相位差并结合SRP算法，SRP-DNN有效解决了多移动声源定位中的交互干扰问题。
